problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biochar. Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
